name: J1939TestOnNMTChange
title: J1939TestOnNMTChange
syntax: void J1939TestOnNMTChange( long ecuHandle, long reason );
description: The function can be implemented in your CAPL program. The J1939 Test Service Library calls this function, if the NMT table changes. The CAPL program can react on this changes.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: handle of the ECU, which has changedUse this handle with J1939TestNmtQueryAddress and J1939TestNmtQueryDeviceName.

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: This parameter contains why this callback was called: 1: ECU did begin with Address Claiming (Address Claim PG was received) 2: ECU did successfully claim an address (250ms after Address Claim PG) 3: ECU lost its address, another ECU has a higher prior name

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
